/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared  -o rosidl_generator_py/openclaw_msgs/openclaw_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/openclaw_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_generator_py/openclaw_msgs/_openclaw_msgs_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/build/openclaw_msgs:/opt/ros/rolling/lib:/opt/ros/rolling/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu: libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfastcdr.so.2.3.5 libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_buffer.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/rolling/lib
